title: Fix admin panel routing error - 'search does not match any page'

requirements.summary: Diagnose and fix the TanStack Router configuration issue causing the 'search does not match any page' error when navigating to /admin
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin successfully loads the AdminDashboardPage without showing 'search does not match any page' error
The route definition in App.tsx correctly maps /admin to the AdminDashboardPage component
TanStack Router properly matches the /admin path and renders the protected admin route
Clicking the Admin Panel link in the Header successfully navigates to and displays the admin dashboard

file_operations.description: Fix the TanStack Router configuration for the /admin route. Ensure the route object includes proper path matching configuration, verify the AdminRoute wrapper is correctly integrated, and confirm no conflicting route definitions exist. Add explicit search parameter validation if TanStack Router requires it for this route. Verify the route is properly registered in the router's route tree.

Verify the Admin Panel navigation link uses the correct routing method compatible with TanStack Router. Ensure the link properly triggers route navigation to /admin without search parameter conflicts. Test that clicking the link initiates proper route matching.

requirements.summary: Verify that the AdminRoute protection wrapper is not interfering with route matching and properly renders the AdminDashboardPage
acceptanceCriteria: AdminRoute component correctly wraps the admin dashboard route without breaking route matching
Authentication and admin role checks complete successfully before rendering the dashboard
The admin dashboard interface displays properly for authenticated admin users

file_operations.description: Review the AdminRoute component to ensure it does not interfere with TanStack Router's route matching. Verify that loading states, authentication checks, and conditional rendering do not prevent the route from being recognized. Ensure the component returns proper React elements in all code paths and handles the route context correctly.

Verify the AdminDashboardPage component is properly exported and can be rendered within the routing context. Ensure no props or context dependencies are causing rendering failures that might appear as routing errors.

requirements.summary: Test the complete admin panel access flow end-to-end and verify all admin dashboard sections are accessible
acceptanceCriteria: Admin users can successfully navigate to /admin from the header link
The admin dashboard loads completely without any routing errors
All three management tabs (Products, Orders, Users) are clickable and display their respective interfaces
No 'search does not match any page' error appears during navigation

file_operations.description: Add error boundary or fallback handling around the admin route to provide better debugging information if routing issues persist. Ensure the route configuration includes proper error handling that distinguishes between authentication failures and route matching failures.

Verify all three admin dashboard tabs (Products, Orders, Users) render correctly and do not trigger routing errors when switching between them. Ensure tab state management does not interfere with the parent route.
